name: IEC 61730 — PV module safety qualification (construction + testing)
standard: IEC 61730-1:2023 (Requirements for construction) + IEC 61730-2:2023 (Requirements for testing) + IEC 61215-1:2021 (PV module design qualification, type approval) + IEC 62548:2023 (PV array design) + IEC 60364-7-712:2017 (Electrical installations — PV)
description: PV module + array safety qualification baseline. IEC 61730-1 covers construction requirements (mechanical, material, durability); IEC 61730-2 covers test sequences (electrical insulation, dielectric withstand, hot-spot, fire, mechanical load, hail, partial discharge); IEC 61215 covers performance qualification + type approval; IEC 62548 covers array-level design rules; IEC 60364-7-712 covers electrical installation. For deep PV-engineering rules (DC/AC ratio, soiling, degradation, shading, bifacial gain, tracker design) enable the pv_design_full rule pack alongside.
